vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on gshadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/gshadow, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/gshadow

triage_decision.reason: Changing permissions on /etc/gshadow to 0000 is a standard STIG hardening procedure to protect shadow group information. It is a simple file permission change that does not impact system availability or connectivity.
